notes: サラリーはESPNのロスター契約値。チーム総額・デッドキャップ・エプロン判定はSpotrac取得成功時のみ正確なチーム配賦額を使用。
情報提供目的です。契約判断はNBA公式発表・CBA・各チーム発表でも確認してください。

transactions.description: Waived Gs Pat Connaughton and Mike Conley. Acquired G Malaki Branham from Washington and sent G Tyus Jones to Dallas as part of a three-team trade. Acquired F Xaiver Tillman from Boston in exchange for cash and draft considerations.
transactions.descriptionJa: G（ガード）Pat ConnaughtonとMike Conleyをウェイブ（契約解除）。 3チーム間トレードの一環として、WashingtonからG（ガード）Malaki Branhamを獲得し、G（ガード）Tyus JonesをDallasへ放出。 BostonからF（フォワード）Xaiver Tillmanを獲得し、対価として金銭およびドラフト関連の権利を放出。

transactions.description: Waived F Georges Niang. Acquired G Eric Gordon from Philadelphia in exchange for a second-round pick swap.
transactions.descriptionJa: F（フォワード）Georges Niangをウェイブ（契約解除）。 PhiladelphiaからG（ガード）Eric Gordonを獲得し、対価として2巡目指名権のスワップ権を放出。

transactions.description: Acquired G Chris Paul from the L.A. Clippers. Acquired C Trayce Jackson-Davis from Golden State in exchange for a 2026 second-round pick.
transactions.descriptionJa: L.A. ClippersからG（ガード）Chris Paulを獲得。 Golden StateからC（センター）Trayce Jackson-Davisを獲得し、対価として2026年2巡目指名権を放出。

transactions.description: Acquired G Lonzo Ball and draft consideration from Cleveland. Acquired F Chris Boucher and draft consideration from Boston. Waived G Lonzo Ball and F Chris Boucher.
transactions.descriptionJa: ClevelandからG（ガード）Lonzo Ballとdraft considerationを獲得。 BostonからF（フォワード）Chris Boucherとdraft considerationを獲得。 G（ガード）Lonzo BallとF（フォワード）Chris Boucherをウェイブ（契約解除）。

transactions.description: Waived F Mason Plumlee.

transactions.descriptionJa: Signed C（センター）Charles BasseyとF（フォワード）Patrick Baldwin Jr。 to 10-day contracts。

transactions.description: Acquired G Jose Alvarado from New Orleans in exchange for F Dalen Terry and draft considerations.
transactions.descriptionJa: New OrleansからG（ガード）Jose Alvaradoを獲得し、対価としてF（フォワード）Dalen Terryとドラフト関連の権利を放出。

transactions.description: Acquired G Ochai Agbaji and draft consideration from Toronto. Waived F Haywood Highsmith. Acquired F Hunter Tyson from Denver and F Josh Minott from Boston in exchange for draft considerations to both teams.
transactions.descriptionJa: TorontoからG（ガード）Ochai Agbajiとdraft considerationを獲得。 F（フォワード）Haywood Highsmithをウェイブ（契約解除）。 Denver and F Josh Minott from BostonからF（フォワード）Hunter Tysonを獲得し、対価としてドラフト関連の権利 to both teamsを放出。

transactions.description: Acquired G Ayo Dosunmu and F Julian Phillips from Chicago in exchange for G Rob Dillingham, F Leonard Miller and four second-round picks.
transactions.descriptionJa: ChicagoからG（ガード）Ayo DosunmuとF（フォワード）Julian Phillipsを獲得し、対価としてG（ガード）Rob Dillingham, F（フォワード）Leonard Millerとfour second-round picksを放出。

transactions.description: Acquired F Ousmane Dieng from Chicago and F Nigel Hayes-Davis from Phoenix in exchange for Gs Cole Anthony and Amir Coffey from Phoenix.
transactions.descriptionJa: Chicago and F Nigel Hayes-Davis from PhoenixからF（フォワード）Ousmane Diengを獲得し、対価としてG（ガード）Cole AnthonyとAmir Coffey from Phoenixを放出。

transactions.description: Acquired G Luke Kennard from Atlanta in exchange for G Gabe Vincent and a 2032 second-round pick.
transactions.descriptionJa: AtlantaからG（ガード）Luke Kennardを獲得し、対価としてG（ガード）Gabe Vincentと2032年2巡目指名権を放出。

transactions.description: Acquired C Ivica Zubac and F Kobe Brown from the L.A. Clippers in exchange for G Bennedict Mathurin, F Isaiah Jackson a 2026 first-round pick, a 2029 first-round pick and a 2028 second-round pick.
transactions.descriptionJa: L.A. ClippersからC（センター）Ivica ZubacとF（フォワード）Kobe Brownを獲得し、対価としてG（ガード）Bennedict Mathurin, F（フォワード）Isaiah Jackson a 2026 first-round pick, a 2029 first-round pickと2028年2巡目指名権を放出。

transactions.description: Acquired a 2026 second-round pick from Toronto Raptors for C Trayce Jackson-Davis.
transactions.descriptionJa: Toronto Raptors for C Trayce Jackson-Davisから2026年2巡目指名権を獲得。

transactions.description: Acquired G AJ Johnson, Fs Khris Middleton and Marvin Bagley III, and draft considerations from Washington in exchange Gs Jaden Hardy, Dante Exum and D'Angelo Russel and F Anthony Davis in a three team trade.
transactions.descriptionJa: Washington in exchange Gs Jaden Hardy, Dante Exum and D'Angelo Russel and F Anthony Davis in a three team tradeからG（ガード）AJ Johnson, F（フォワード）Khris MiddletonとMarvin Bagley III,とドラフト関連の権利を獲得。

transactions.description: Acquired G Rob Dillingham, F Leonard Miller and four second-round picks from Minnesota Timberwolves for G Ayo Dosunmu and F Julian Phillips.
transactions.descriptionJa: Minnesota Timberwolves for G Ayo Dosunmu and F Julian PhillipsからG（ガード）Rob Dillingham, F（フォワード）Leonard Millerとfour second-round picksを獲得。

transactions.description: Acquired F Dalen Terry and draft considerations from New York Knicks for G Jose Alvarado.
transactions.descriptionJa: New York Knicks for G Jose AlvaradoからF（フォワード）Dalen Terryとドラフト関連の権利を獲得。

transactions.description: Acquired C Nikola Vucevic and draft consideration from Chicago in exchange for G Anfernee Simons and draft consideration. Signed F Amari Williams to a rest-of-season contract.
transactions.descriptionJa: ChicagoからC（センター）Nikola Vucevicとdraft considerationを獲得し、対価としてG（ガード）Anfernee Simonsとdraft considerationを放出。 F（フォワード）Amari Williamsとa rest-of-season contractで契約。

transactions.description: Acquired G Gabe Vincent and a 2032 second-round pick from Los Angeles Lakers for G Luke Kennard.

transactions.description: Acquired F Ousmane Dieng and a second-round draft pick from Oklahoma City in exchange for C Mason Plumlee. Acquired Gs Mike Conley and Coby White from Chicago in exchange for F Ousmane Dieng, G Collin Sexton and three second-round picks.
transactions.descriptionJa: Oklahoma CityからF（フォワード）Ousmane Diengとa second-round draft pickを獲得し、対価としてC（センター）Mason Plumleeを放出。 ChicagoからG（ガード）Mike ConleyとCoby Whiteを獲得し、対価としてF（フォワード）Ousmane Dieng, G（ガード）Collin Sextonとthree second-round picksを放出。
